meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Solve Founder Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop staring at a blank screen. Learn to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to validate SaaS ideas, build MVPs at lightning speed, and ship revenue-ready code.
content.answer_block: To overcome project paralysis, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to rapidly prototype and validate market-fit. By automating the boilerplate through agentic workflows, you transform abstract pain points into executable codebases. This setup shifts your focus from 'how to code' to 'what users will pay for,' accelerating your path to MVP.
content.intro:
The silent killer of every SaaS founder is not a lack of capital, but a lack of momentum. You sit at your desk, the cursor blinking like a heartbeat, while the market opportunity shifts under your feet. The 'blank canvas syndrome' isn't a creative failure; it's a technical bottleneck that keeps your best ideas trapped in the ether.

Today, we shatter that bottleneck. By combining the agentic precision of Claude Code with the architectural leverage of Antigravity, you gain a force multiplier that turns raw concepts into deployable infrastructure in hours, not weeks. We are moving beyond simple coding assistants; we are building a production-grade engine for your next venture.

steps.title: Define Market Pain with Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, use Antigravity to identify high-value, underserved niches by analyzing current search trends and developer pain points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current SaaS market gaps in the [Industry Name] sector. Identify 3 high-frequency user frustrations that can be solved with a lean, AI-native micro-SaaS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config --set-project-context 'Build a micro-SaaS focused on [Niche]'

steps.title: Architect the MVP Schema
steps.description: Generate a robust, scalable data schema that supports rapid iteration and future-proofing your revenue model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a subscription-based SaaS. Include tables for users, billing, and core features. Output in Prisma format.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a Prisma schema based on the provided architecture file.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Core Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold the primary engine of your application, ensuring type safety and clean modular design from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular TypeScript service layer that handles [Core Functionality] with error handling and logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Implement the core logic for [Feature] using the generated schema.'

steps.title: Integrate Monetization Hooks
steps.description: Hard-code your revenue path early. Connect your business logic to Stripe or similar providers to ensure you are building for profit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Stripe integration module that creates a checkout session for a monthly subscription plan.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Integrate the Stripe checkout flow into the current API routes.'

steps.title: Deploy to Production Environment
steps.description: Automate the CI/CD pipeline so every change you make is verified and ready for real-world user testing immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests and deploys the application to Vercel upon merge to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Configure the production deployment pipeline for this project.'

pro_tips: Always force Claude Code to generate unit tests alongside logic; it prevents the technical debt that kills early-stage founders.
Use 'context-first' prompting: feed your entire project documentation into Claude Code before asking for complex refactors.
Treat your codebase as an ephemeral asset; if a feature doesn't drive revenue in 72 hours, use Claude Code to delete it and pivot.
Keep your Antigravity prompts modular; separate your 'Business Logic' prompts from 'UI/UX' prompts for better model focus.
Leverage Claude Code's shell execution capability to automate local environment setup, saving you hours of configuration drift.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, use the feedback loop to iterate. Feed user analytics back into Antigravity to refine your product roadmap, then use Claude Code to implement the highest-requested features.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the same technical leverage used by top-tier SaaS founders. The only thing standing between you and your first $1k MRR is the execution of your next commit. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
